image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a slender, pale female hand trembling as it raises a crystal champagne coupe. Background softly blurred with white floral arch and warm golden hour sunlight filtering through petals. Shallow depth of field, warm golden hour lighting with soft lens flare.
video_prompt: A slender pale hand slowly and tremblingly raises a crystal champagne coupe upward. The liquid inside the glass gently sways. Soft golden light flickers through blurred flower petals in the background.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（畫外音）：從這一刻起……

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Wide shot under a white floral arch in an outdoor garden wedding venue. On the left stands Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery at the waist, holding a champagne coupe. Facing her on the right stands Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, tall and upright build, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with a white rose boutonniere on his chest. Their eyes lock. Su Wan's lips form a gentle smile but her eyes are ice-cold. Warm golden hour backlighting, white flowers and greenery framing the scene.
video_prompt: Camera rapidly pulls back from close-up to wide shot revealing the full wedding scene. Su Wan and Lu Shen stand facing each other under a white floral arch. Su Wan holds up a champagne coupe with a faint smile. A gentle breeze stirs the flowers on the arch. Golden sunlight streams through the garden.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（畫外音）：……你只剩三分鐘。

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium shot under a white floral arch at an outdoor garden wedding. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery visible at the waist, gazes lovingly at Lu Shen. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with a white rose boutonniere, smiles elegantly and gently holds her hand. Warm natural sunlight, soft romantic atmosphere.
video_prompt: Su Wan gazes deeply into Lu Shen's eyes, her lips moving as she recites her vows. Lu Shen smiles warmly and gently squeezes her hand. Soft natural light bathes them both. A subtle breeze moves through the floral arch above.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚：……無論順境逆境，我都願與你共度餘生。
subtitle_en: Su Wan: ...for better or for worse, I will spend the rest of my life with you.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Close-up detail shot of the waist area of a white mermaid wedding gown showing delicate hidden monogram embroidery. At the side of the gown, a phone screen emits a faint blue-white glow. The bride's slender fingers rest near the phone. Background is the softly blurred floral arch. Warm natural lighting with a subtle cold phone screen glow on the fabric.
video_prompt: Camera focuses on the waist detail of the white mermaid wedding gown, revealing the hidden monogram embroidery. A phone at her side suddenly vibrates, its screen flickering with a cold blue light against the white fabric. Su Wan's fingers twitch slightly near the phone.
lighting: warm natural with cold phone screen glow

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a phone screen held low at waist level. The screen displays a text message in Chinese and English: 'The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.' The screen casts cold blue-white light upward. Blurred white mermaid wedding gown fabric visible around the edges. Cold screen lighting dominates the frame.
video_prompt: A phone screen lights up showing a text message. The cold blue light from the screen illuminates the surrounding white fabric of the wedding gown. The message text is clearly visible on screen.
subtitle_zh: （手機文字：新郎殺了你姐姐，證據在他西裝內袋。）
subtitle_en: (Phone text: The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.)

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Su Wan's face, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin. Her pupils are visibly contracted, eyes wide with shock. Cold blue phone screen light illuminates the lower half of her face from below, creating dramatic under-lighting. Her jaw is tight, fingers barely visible at the edge of frame gripping tightly. Despite the shock in her eyes, her lips are pressed into a controlled, composed line. The next instant she forces a flawless smile. Dark background contrasts with the cold light on her face.
video_prompt: Su Wan's pupils contract sharply as she reads the phone. Her fingers tighten. Cold blue light from below illuminates her face. After a tense beat, she lifts her head and forces a perfect, composed bridal smile. The light shifts from cold blue to warm ambient as she looks up.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Over-the-shoulder shot from behind Lu Shen's right shoulder. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, leans in elegantly holding a champagne coupe, her lips nearly touching Lu Shen's ear as she whispers. Lu Shen's short side-parted well-groomed hair and the edge of his black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere are visible in the foreground. Dramatic lighting with warm ambient on one side and cold shadow on the other.
video_prompt: Su Wan gracefully lifts her champagne coupe and leans in toward Lu Shen under the pretense of a toast. She moves close to his ear, her lips nearly touching. Her mouth moves subtly as she whispers. Lu Shen's body stiffens visibly.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（低語）：姐姐失蹤那天……你在哪裡？
subtitle_en: Su Wan (whisper): The day my sister disappeared... where were you?
lighting: dramatic contrast — warm ambient and cold shadow

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Lu Shen's eyes. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin. His pupils are dilated and trembling with visible panic. His forced smile is cracking at the edges. Sweat beads form at his temple. In the soft background blur, two champagne coupes clink together, wine trembling inside the glasses. Dramatic lighting — one side warm, one side cold shadow cutting across his face.
video_prompt: Extreme close-up on Lu Shen's eyes as they widen with barely concealed terror. His pupils shake. A bead of sweat rolls down his temple. In the blurred foreground, two champagne glasses clink together and the wine ripples violently.
subtitle_zh: 陸深（低語，強裝鎮定）：晚晚，你在說什麼？今天是我們的大日子。
subtitle_en: Lu Shen (whisper, feigning calm): Wan, what are you talking about? Today is our big day.
lighting: dramatic contrast — warm and cold split

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Wide shot of outdoor garden wedding venue. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery at the waist, stands facing rows of seated guests, raising a champagne glass for a speech. Behind her is a champagne tower glinting in the light. Further behind stands Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man in a black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere, his expression slowly freezing. Warm lighting beginning to fade to cooler tones.
video_prompt: Su Wan turns to face the guests and raises her champagne glass. She speaks with a warm, grateful expression. Camera slowly pushes in. In the background, Lu Shen's smile gradually fades and his expression becomes rigid. Guests begin to shift uncomfortably in their seats.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚：感謝所有人見證這一刻。但今天，我想讓一個無法到場的人……也被記住。
subtitle_en: Su Wan: Thank you all for witnessing this moment. But today, I want someone who couldn't be here... to also be remembered.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium close-up of Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, her expression shifting from warmth to solemnity. She holds her champagne glass at chest level. Behind her, blurred guests lean in and whisper to each other. The lighting has shifted to a cooler, more ominous tone. Her eyes carry deep sorrow and quiet determination.
video_prompt: Su Wan's expression transitions from grateful warmth to heavy solemnity as she mentions her missing sister. She pauses, her eyes glistening. In the blurred background, guests begin whispering to each other, the murmur rising. The ambient light subtly shifts cooler.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚：我的姐姐，蘇遙——她兩年前失蹤了。她最後一次被人看見的時候……戴著一條很特別的項鏈。
subtitle_en: Su Wan: My sister, Su Yao — she disappeared two years ago. The last time anyone saw her... she was wearing a very special necklace.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium shot transitioning to close-up. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, reaches her slender hand into the inner chest pocket of Lu Shen's black three-piece tuxedo. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, stands frozen, his face draining of color. Her movement is gentle but commanding. Dramatic cold lighting casts sharp shadows.
video_prompt: Su Wan sets down her glass and turns to face Lu Shen. Her hand reaches out slowly and deliberately, sliding into the inner pocket of his black tuxedo jacket. Lu Shen stands paralyzed, unable to stop her. She smoothly withdraws her hand, pulling out a delicate necklace that catches the light.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（聲音平靜如水）：這條項鏈……是姐姐失蹤那天戴的。
subtitle_en: Su Wan (voice calm as still water): This necklace... is the one my sister wore the day she vanished.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a delicate necklace dangling from Su Wan's slender pale fingers. The necklace is identical to the one seen in a small inset photo in the corner showing Su Yao, a 30-34 year old woman with fair white skin and a build similar to Su Wan, wearing a red dress with the same necklace. In the blurred background, Lu Shen stumbles backward, his face ashen white, lips trembling. Guests' blurred faces show shock. Dramatic cold blue lighting with sharp highlights on the necklace.
video_prompt: Extreme close-up of the necklace dangling from Su Wan's fingers, slowly rotating and catching the light. Camera pulls back to reveal Lu Shen stumbling backward, his face drained of all color, lips trembling. Gasps and shocked murmurs erupt from the blurred crowd in the background.
subtitle_zh:
蘇晚：它為什麼……在我丈夫的口袋裡？
陸深：不……這不是……你不明白——！
subtitle_en:
Su Wan: Why... was it in my husband's pocket?
Lu Shen: No... this isn't... you don't understand—!
camera_angle: extreme close-up on necklace, wide reaction

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Handheld shaky-cam style shot. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair now disheveled, tan wheat-colored skin, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere askew, lunges forward aggressively with one arm outstretched trying to grab the necklace. His face is contorted with rage and desperation, his genteel facade completely shattered. Motion blur on his reaching hand. Blurred guests recoil in the background. Harsh dramatic lighting with deep shadows.
video_prompt: Lu Shen lunges violently forward, reaching to snatch the necklace from Su Wan's hand. His movements are desperate and aggressive, completely shattering his refined composure. Guests in the background scramble backward in fear. The camera shakes with handheld energy.
subtitle_zh: 陸深（嘶吼）：你設計我——！你從一開始就——
subtitle_en: Lu Shen (screaming): You set me up—! From the very start you—

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Low-angle shot looking up at Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown swaying slightly in the breeze. She stands perfectly still, looking down with ice-cold, emotionless eyes. At the bottom of the frame, Lu Shen is collapsed on the ground, head in his hands, his black three-piece tuxedo rumpled. Harsh dramatic overhead lighting creates a halo effect around Su Wan while Lu Shen is cast in shadow.
video_prompt: Su Wan stands completely motionless, her white mermaid gown swaying gently in the breeze. She gazes down at Lu Shen with frozen, emotionless eyes. Lu Shen collapses to the ground at her feet, burying his head in his hands in defeat. The wind stirs flower petals around them.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（冰冷）：從一開始？不。是從姐姐消失的那一天開始。
subtitle_en: Su Wan (ice-cold): From the start? No. From the day my sister disappeared.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Su Wan's face, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin. She wears a faint, cold smile — not a bride's joyful smile but a hunter's satisfied smirk. Her eyes are sharp, calculating, and devoid of warmth. Cold blue lighting sculpts her features with precise shadows. The background is completely dark, isolating her face in the frame.
video_prompt: Camera slowly pushes in on Su Wan's face as a faint, cold smile gradually spreads across her lips. It is not a smile of happiness but of calculated triumph. Her eyes narrow with dark satisfaction. The lighting shifts to cold blue, shadows deepening around her.
subtitle_zh: 蘇晚（錄音畫外音）：姐，我會讓他親手把證據帶到我面前。
subtitle_en: Su Wan (recording, V.O.): Sis, I'll make him bring the evidence to me with his own hands.

image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Dim, moody wide shot of a dark room one week earlier. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair down (not in bridal updo), fair white skin, slender build, wearing dark casual clothing, sits at a desk illuminated by a single desk lamp. Before her are spread documents — a man's schedule printout and a missing-person report with a photo of Su Yao in a red dress. A voice recorder sits on the desk, its red recording light glowing. Su Wan's expression is focused and determined. Dim warm lamplight in an otherwise dark room.
video_prompt: Flashback scene: Su Wan sits in a dimly lit room, speaking into a small voice recorder. Her fingers trace across documents spread on the desk — schedules and a missing-person report. The single desk lamp flickers slightly. She looks up from the documents with fierce determination in her eyes. The red light on the voice recorder pulses.
subtitle_zh:
蘇晚（錄音畫外音）：他會穿上最體面的衣服，站在最多人面前，然後……親手毀掉自己。
（字幕：這場婚禮，從來就不是婚禮。）
subtitle_en:
Su Wan (recording, V.O.): He'll wear his finest suit, stand before the most witnesses, and then... destroy himself.
(Title card: This wedding was never a wedding.)
